name: Spinach Stuffed Mushrooms
recipeIngredient: 10 oz frozen chopped spinach, thawed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the mushrooms and carefully remove the stems. Lay the caps on a nonstick jelly-roll pan and bake for 5-10 minutes to dry out and cook slightly. Set aside.
2. Chop the mushroom stems finely.
3. In a small saucepan, sauté shallots, garlic, and balsamic vinegar until onions turn translucent. Add mushroom stems, water, and seasoning. Cook for a few minutes.
4. Add spinach and cook until the water is almost all absorbed/evaporated.
5. Mound the spinach mixture onto the mushroom caps, pressing it into the caps.
6. Lower the oven heat to 300-350°F and bake for 10-15 minutes until hot and the mushroom caps are cooked.
7. If left slightly undercooked, these can be done ahead of time and reheated in the microwave when needed.
Chicken Style Seasoning:
1 1/3 cup nutritional yeast flakes
3 tbsp onion powder
2 1/2 tsp garlic powder
1 tbsp salt
1 tsp celery seed
2 1/2 tbsp Italian seasoning
2 tbsp parsley, dried
